title: You Are My Rock

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: In silence I find my rest
My soul turns toward heaven's breast
Through storms and trials
I stand secure
My foundation will endure
You are my rock, my salvation
My fortress through every nation
No power can shake this ground
In You alone peace is found
In You alone peace is found
Why do they plot and scheme?
Like walls that crack and lean
Their whispers fade like morning mist
Their power cannot persist
You are my rock, my salvation
My fortress through every nation
No power can shake this ground
In You alone peace is found
In You alone peace is found
Pour out your heart like water
Before the throne of grace
Every burden, every fear
Finds mercy in this place
All glory belongs to You Your strength forever true
Your love flows down like morning light
Your mercy makes all things right
You are my rock, my salvation
My fortress through every nation
No power can shake this ground
In You alone peace is found
In You alone peace is found

sections.label: Outro
lines: In silence I find my rest My soul is finally blessed

epigraph: He only is my rock and my salvation
